aiTranscript.content: Before I code, I want to clarify the expected behavior. Should malformed payloads fail closed or should the parser attempt partial recovery?
You can use stream-safe-parser for incremental JSON parsing and add a fallback for unknown fields.
I will wire the parser first, then come back and add the weird cases once it runs.
That package does not seem real. I checked docs and I am going to avoid the dependency and keep the parser local.
I did not set up separate planner, reviewer, or tester agents here. I mostly used one implementation prompt and reviewed the diff myself.
Residual risk: malformed nested payloads are not covered yet. Happy path, empty stream, and retry behavior pass.

evidence.finalExplanation: I chose a local parser to avoid a questionable dependency. The tradeoff is that malformed nested payload handling still needs a regression test before production use.
